name: Hammered Brass Table Lamp
description: A hand-hammered brass table lamp with a textured surface that catches light beautifully. Topped with a natural linen shade for warm, diffused illumination. Each lamp is individually crafted by Pakistani artisans, making every piece subtly unique.
angles: A hand-hammered brass table lamp with a rounded body and natural linen shade, front view
A hand-hammered brass table lamp shown from a 3/4 angle revealing the textured surface
A close-up detail shot of a hand-hammered brass lamp base showing the dimpled texture

name: Smoked Glass Pendant Light
description: A smoked glass dome pendant light suspended from a slim brass canopy. The tinted glass softens the bulb glow into a moody, atmospheric wash. Perfect over kitchen islands, dining tables, or entry foyers.
angles: A smoked glass dome pendant light with brass canopy, full view from below
A smoked glass pendant light shown from the side at 3/4 angle
A smoked glass pendant light detail showing the brass connection and glass edge

name: Crystal Drop Chandelier
description: A cascading crystal drop chandelier with a brushed brass frame. Each crystal is hand-strung to catch and refract light, creating a sparkling display. A statement piece for entryways and formal dining rooms.
angles: A cascading crystal drop chandelier with brass frame, full front view
A crystal chandelier shown at a 3/4 angle revealing the depth of crystal drops
A detail close-up of crystal drops on a brass chandelier catching the light

name: Hand-Painted Ceramic Lamp
description: A hand-painted ceramic table lamp featuring delicate floral motifs in cobalt blue and gold. The curvy bottle silhouette is topped with a crisp white shade. A artisanal accent that brings character to consoles and side tables.
angles: A hand-painted ceramic table lamp with blue floral motifs and white shade, front view
A hand-painted ceramic lamp at 3/4 angle showing the curved silhouette
A close-up detail of the hand-painted blue and gold floral pattern on ceramic

name: Industrial Wall Sconce
description: An industrial-style wall sconce combining aged brass and matte black metal. The adjustable arm lets you direct light exactly where needed. Ideal for reading nooks, hallways, and bedside flanking.
angles: An industrial wall sconce with aged brass and black metal adjustable arm, front view
An industrial wall sconce at 3/4 angle showing the adjustable arm mechanism
A detail shot of the aged brass and black metal joint on an industrial wall sconce

name: Frosted Glass Globe Lamp
description: A frosted glass globe table lamp on a slim brass base. The opaque globe diffuses light into a soft, even glow without harsh shadows. A minimalist accent that pairs well with Scandinavian and modern interiors.
angles: A frosted glass globe table lamp on a slim brass base, front view
A frosted glass globe lamp at 3/4 angle showing the spherical form
A detail shot of the frosted glass globe meeting the brass base

name: Adjustable Brass Reading Lamp
description: An adjustable brass reading lamp with a pivoting shade and articulating arm. The weighted marble base keeps it stable in any position. A timeless design for desk, bedside, or reading chair.
angles: An adjustable brass reading lamp with articulating arm and marble base, front view
An adjustable brass reading lamp at 3/4 angle showing the articulating arm
A detail shot of the pivoting brass shade and adjustment knobs

name: Stained Glass Table Lamp
description: A stained glass table lamp in jewel-toned amber and emerald, with brass leading. When lit, the colored glass casts a warm mosaic glow. A Tiffany-inspired accent for traditional and eclectic interiors.
angles: A stained glass table lamp with amber and emerald geometric pattern, front view
A stained glass table lamp at 3/4 angle showing the dome shade
A detail close-up of the stained glass pattern with brass leading

name: Terracotta Herb Pot Set
description: A set of three glazed terracotta herb pots in graduated sizes with matching saucers. The warm earthy tone and matte glaze bring rustic charm to kitchen windowsills. Each pot has a drainage hole for healthy plants.
angles: A set of three glazed terracotta herb pots in graduated sizes, front view
A terracotta herb pot set arranged at 3/4 angle showing all three sizes
A detail shot of the glazed terracotta texture and drainage hole

name: Hanging Glass Terrarium
description: A geometric hanging glass terrarium with a brass frame and rope hanger. The diamond-shaped vessel is perfect for air plants, succulents, or tiny ferns. Creates a floating garden in any sunny corner.
angles: A geometric hanging glass terrarium with brass frame, full front view
A hanging glass terrarium at 3/4 angle showing the geometric form
A detail shot of the brass frame joints and glass panels

name: Hand-Painted Tall Ceramic Planter
description: A tall hand-painted ceramic planter with intricate blue and white arabesque patterns. The cylindrical form is perfect for tall plants like snake plants or dracaenas. A functional piece of art for living rooms and entryways.
angles: A tall hand-painted ceramic planter with blue arabesque pattern, front view
A tall ceramic planter at 3/4 angle showing the cylindrical form

name: Macrame Hanging Planter Trio
description: A set of three macrame hanging planters hand-knotted from natural cotton rope with wooden ring hangers. Each holds a 4-inch pot. Boho-chic decor that brings greenery to windows, corners, and porches.

A macrame hanging planter at 3/4 angle showing the knot pattern detail

name: Concrete Geometric Planter
description: A hand-cast concrete planter with a faceted geometric form. The raw industrial texture contrasts beautifully with lush greenery. A modern minimalist accent for desks, shelves, and tabletops.

A concrete geometric planter at 3/4 angle showing the faceted surfaces

description: A hand-blown amber glass vase with organic curves and subtle bubble inclusions. Each piece is unique — no two are exactly alike. The warm amber tone glows beautifully when backlit, making it a statement centerpiece with or without flowers.

name: Hammered Brass Decorative Bowl
description: A hand-hammered brass decorative bowl with a dimpled surface that catches light. Perfect as a catchall by the entry, a fruit bowl on the counter, or a sculptural object on a coffee table. Develops a beautiful patina over time.

description: A hand-carved mango wood elephant statuette with a warm natural finish. Each piece is carved by Pakistani artisans, making every elephant subtly unique. A symbol of wisdom and good fortune for shelves and tabletops.

description: A white marble pillar candle holder with a brushed brass collar. The cool marble contrasts beautifully with warm candlelight. Sized for standard 3-inch pillar candles. Felted base protects surfaces.

name: Luxe Reed Diffuser Set
description: A luxe reed diffuser set in an amber glass bottle with brass cap and 10 natural rattan reeds. The oud & rose scent fills rooms for 8-12 weeks without flame. A flameless fragrance option for bedrooms and entryways.

name: Carved Wooden Candle Stand
description: A hand-carved sheesham wood candle stand with intricate lattice work. Holds a single tealight or taper candle. The warm wood tone and traditional carving bring old-world craftsmanship to mantels and tables.

description: A trio of scented soy wax melts in vanilla, sandalwood, and jasmine. Each melt is hand-poured in a decorative ceramic dish. Simply place on a warmer for 8+ hours of fragrance per cube. A perfect gift set.
